# Transcrição: How_to_stop_people_from_interrupting_you

- **Fonte:** How_to_stop_people_from_interrupting_you
- **Duração:** 01:06
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:06]

I'm a serial interrupter. Serial. I interrupt people all the time and I've had to work on this a lot. So if you have someone like me in your life, I'm so sorry, this is a really important technique to learn. Before you share your thoughts at a complex which require time, right, and you don't want to be interrupted, you need to prime that conversation. You can say something like this. You can say, Hey, Vin, I really want to share something with you and I hope you don't mind. Do you mind giving me the floor for the next 10 minutes? And I want to fully and completely explain this point to you. And then I'm going to ask for your opinion at the end. Is that okay? I would then put a timer on and just go, Thanks for letting me do this. I just want to be able to get it all out and then ask for your opinion. This way you're able to stop people like me from interrupting. And a lot of the times when I'm interrupting, it's not because I'm trying to be rude. More often than not, I just want to add value. So when you're dealing with someone like this, when you say to them, I want to share my thoughts wholly and completely for the next 10 minutes, you're giving them a framework where you're saying, and I'm going to ask for your opinion at the end. So that just makes them go, Oh, good. Oh, good. Cause I want to, I want to add value and that just kind of gives, gives a frame for that conversation that's about to happen.
